input: {"question": "How many artists are in the database?"}
expected_output: {"sql": "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM artist"}

input: {"question": "How many tracks are longer than 5 minutes?"}
expected_output: {"sql": "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM track WHERE milliseconds > 300000"}

input: {"question": "How many customers are from the USA?"}
expected_output: {"sql": "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer WHERE country = 'USA'"}

input: {"question": "How many albums are in the database?"}
expected_output: {"sql": "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM album"}

input: {"question": "How many employees work at the company?"}
expected_output: {"sql": "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee"}

input: {"question": "List all customers from Canada"}
expected_output: {"sql": "SELECT * FROM customer WHERE country = 'Canada'"}

input: {"question": "Find all tracks in the Rock genre"}
expected_output: {"sql": "SELECT t.* FROM track t JOIN genre g ON t.genre_id = g.genre_id WHERE g.name = 'Rock'"}

input: {"question": "Show employees who report to Andrew Adams"}
expected_output: {"sql": "SELECT e.* FROM employee e JOIN employee m ON e.reports_to = m.employee_id WHERE m.first_name = 'Andrew' AND m.last_name = 'Adams'"}

input: {"question": "List all albums with their artist names"}
expected_output: {"sql": "SELECT album.title, artist.name FROM album JOIN artist ON album.artist_id = artist.artist_id"}

input: {"question": "Show all tracks with their album and artist names"}
expected_output: {"sql": "SELECT t.name as track_name, al.title as album_title, ar.name as artist_name FROM track t JOIN album al ON t.album_id = al.album_id JOIN artist ar ON al.artist_id = ar.artist_id"}

input: {"question": "List all invoices with customer names and countries"}
expected_output: {"sql": "SELECT i.invoice_id, c.first_name, c.last_name, c.country, i.total FROM invoice i JOIN customer c ON i.customer_id = c.customer_id"}

input: {"question": "How many tracks are in each genre?"}
expected_output: {"sql": "SELECT g.name, COUNT(*) as track_count FROM track t JOIN genre g ON t.genre_id = g.genre_id GROUP BY g.genre_id, g.name ORDER BY track_count DESC"}

input: {"question": "What is the total sales amount by country?"}
expected_output: {"sql": "SELECT c.country, SUM(i.total) as total_sales FROM invoice i JOIN customer c ON i.customer_id = c.customer_id GROUP BY c.country ORDER BY total_sales DESC"}

input: {"question": "How many albums does each artist have?"}
expected_output: {"sql": "SELECT ar.name, COUNT(*) as album_count FROM album al JOIN artist ar ON al.artist_id = ar.artist_id GROUP BY ar.artist_id, ar.name ORDER BY album_count DESC"}

input: {"question": "What are the 10 longest tracks?"}
expected_output: {"sql": "SELECT name, milliseconds FROM track ORDER BY milliseconds DESC LIMIT 10"}

input: {"question": "Who are the top 5 customers by total purchase amount?"}
expected_output: {"sql": "SELECT c.first_name, c.last_name, SUM(i.total) as total_spent FROM customer c JOIN invoice i ON c.customer_id = i.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 5"}

input: {"question": "What are the 5 most expensive tracks?"}
expected_output: {"sql": "SELECT name, unit_price FROM track ORDER BY unit_price DESC LIMIT 5"}

input: {"question": "What is the total revenue from all invoices?"}
expected_output: {"sql": "SELECT SUM(total) FROM invoice"}

input: {"question": "What is the total duration of all tracks in minutes?"}
expected_output: {"sql": "SELECT SUM(milliseconds) / 60000.0 as total_minutes FROM track"}

input: {"question": "How many invoices were created in 2023?"}
expected_output: {"sql": "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invoice WHERE invoice_date >= '2023-01-01' AND invoice_date < '2024-01-01'"}

input: {"question": "What is the total revenue for 2022?"}
expected_output: {"sql": "SELECT SUM(total) FROM invoice WHERE invoice_date >= '2022-01-01' AND invoice_date < '2023-01-01'"}

input: {"question": "Which customers spent the most in 2023?"}
expected_output: {"sql": "SELECT c.first_name, c.last_name, SUM(i.total) as total_spent FROM customer c JOIN invoice i ON c.customer_id = i.customer_id WHERE i.invoice_date >= '2023-01-01' AND i.invoice_date < '2024-01-01' GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 10"}

input: {"question": "What are the most popular genres by number of tracks sold?"}
expected_output: {"sql": "SELECT g.name, COUNT(il.track_id) as tracks_sold FROM invoice_line il JOIN track t ON il.track_id = t.track_id JOIN genre g ON t.genre_id = g.genre_id GROUP BY g.genre_id, g.name ORDER BY tracks_sold DESC LIMIT 10"}

input: {"question": "Which artists have the highest total sales revenue?"}
expected_output: {"sql": "SELECT ar.name, SUM(il.unit_price * il.quantity) as revenue FROM invoice_line il JOIN track t ON il.track_id = t.track_id JOIN album al ON t.album_id = al.album_id JOIN artist ar ON al.artist_id = ar.artist_id GROUP BY ar.artist_id, ar.name ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 10"}

input: {"question": "What is the average invoice total by customer country, for countries with more than 5 customers?"}
expected_output: {"sql": "SELECT c.country, AVG(i.total) as avg_invoice FROM invoice i JOIN customer c ON i.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE c.country IN (SELECT country FROM customer GROUP BY country HAVING COUNT(*) > 5) GROUP BY c.country ORDER BY avg_invoice DESC"}
